title: Aranet Battery Level Predictive Replacement Windows
app: Custom HEC or scripted input from Aranet Cloud API / Aranet PRO base station
spl:
index=environment sourcetype="aranet:sensor" earliest=-60d
| eval batt=tonumber(coalesce(battery_pct, battery, ""))
| where isnotnull(batt)
| timechart span=1d min(batt) as min_battery_pct by sensor_id
description: Wireless sensors fail when batteries fade; trending minima schedules bulk replacement before winter heating season.
value: Cuts emergency site visits and prevents data gaps during audits.
implementation: (1) Confirm percentage field. (2) Alert below 20%. (3) Export monthly work orders.
grandmaExplanation: We track sensor batteries so they are replaced before they die.
